name: STM32H5E4 TFBGA225 SMPS
description: Generated from the STM32H5E4 alternate-function workbook and STM32H5E4VJ datasheet for STM32H5E4 TFBGA225 SMPS. This definition models the TFBGA225 SMPS package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32H5E4 devices add graphics, display, camera, and wide external-memory paths across the high-end STM32H5 packages. This package definition exposes 74 peripheral blocks covering 12 timers, 6 low-power timers, 13 serial ports, 6 SPI controllers, 3 I2S interfaces, 4 I2C controllers, 2 serial audio interfaces, 2 SDMMC host interfaces, 3 FDCAN controllers, an Ethernet MAC interface, 2 USB OTG interfaces, 3 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, 1 on-chip operational amplifier, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, a digital camera interface, LCD-TFT display signals, and 1 USB Type-C / Power Delivery controller.
